mapper.sql: id, user_id, warn_type, proc_inst_id, proc_name, task_name, team_name, node_key, node_name, end_date, is_read, admin_read, resolved, create_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task_warning (user_id, warn_type, proc_inst_id, proc_name, task_name, team_name, node_key, node_name, end_date, is_read, resolved, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{warnType}, #{procInstId}, #{procName}, #{taskName}, #{teamName}, #{nodeKey}, #{nodeName}, #{endDate}, #{isRead}, #{resolved}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task_warning WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0 AND resolved = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE task_warning SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.select: SELECT t1.id, t1.user_id, t1.warn_type, t1.proc_inst_id, t1.proc_name, t1.task_name, t1.team_name, t1.node_key, t1.node_name, t1.end_date, t1.admin_read AS is_read, t1.admin_read, t1.resolved, t1.create_time FROM task_warning t1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT MIN(id) AS min_id FROM task_warning GROUP BY proc_inst_id, node_key, warn_type ) t2 ON t1.id = t2.min_id ORDER BY t1.resolved ASC, t1.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(proc_inst_id, ':', node_key, ':', warn_type)) FROM task_warning WHERE resolved = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT MIN(id) AS min_id FROM task_warning WHERE resolved = 0 GROUP BY proc_inst_id, node_key, warn_type ) t INNER JOIN task_warning w ON w.id = t.min_id WHERE w.admin_read = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE task_warning SET admin_read = 1 WHERE admin_read = 0
UPDATE task_warning SET is_read = 1 WHERE is_read = 0
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM task_warning WHERE id IN #{id} AND resolved = 1
DELETE FROM task_warning WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND resolved = 1
mapper.select: SELECT tw.node_name AS nodeName, COUNT(*) AS warningCount, SUM(CASE WHEN tw.resolved = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unresolvedCount, IFNULL(AVG( CASE WHEN tw.resolved = 1 AND tne.complete_time IS NOT NULL THEN GREATEST(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, tw.create_time, tne.complete_time), 1) WHEN tw.resolved = 1 THEN GREATEST(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, tw.create_time, IFNULL(tw.end_date, tw.create_time)), 1) WHEN tw.resolved = 0 THEN GREATEST(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, tw.create_time, NOW()), 1) ELSE NULL END ), 0) AS avgResponseMinutes FROM task_warning tw LEFT JOIN task_execution_record ter ON ter.proc_inst_id = tw.proc_inst_id LEFT JOIN task_node_execution tne ON tne.exec_record_id = ter.id AND tne.node_key = tw.node_key AND tne.status = 'completed' WHERE tw.node_name IS NOT NULL AND tw.node_name != '' GROUP BY tw.node_name ORDER BY warningCount DESC
